name: ignore: LinkedIn job-alert digest, deliberately worded to look interview-ish

email.subject: 5 new interview-ready jobs matching your search
email.snippet: New jobs recommended for you based on your profile. See interview tips inside.

email.subject: How was your experience? Take our quick survey
email.snippet: We'd love your feedback on your recent interview process.

name: rejected: reject-before-confirm ordering (contains applied-style phrasing too)

email.subject: Update on your application to Acme
email.snippet: Thank you for your interest in the Software Engineer role at Acme. After careful consideration, we have decided to move forward with other candidates.

email.subject: Your application to Globex
email.snippet: We wanted to let you know that you have not been selected for this role.

email.subject: Your offer from Initech
email.snippet: We are pleased to offer you the position of Backend Engineer at Initech.

email.subject: Complete your online assessment for Umbrella Corp
email.snippet: Please complete the coding challenge within 5 days.

email.subject: Let's schedule your interview at Soylent
email.snippet: We would like to invite you to interview for the Data Engineer role.

email.subject: Quick recruiter call this week?
email.snippet: Would love to chat with our recruiter about your background.

email.subject: Your application to Anthropic
email.snippet: We have received your application and will be in touch.

email.subject: Thank you for applying to Whatnot!
email.snippet: Thank you for applying. Our team will review your application shortly.

name: fall-through: unrecognized email matches no rule

email.subject: Congrats on the new role!
email.snippet: Saw your update, congrats! Let's catch up soon.
